creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Created attachment 246992
Patch to add pkg-message to x11/mako

The attached patch adds a pkg-message describing how to manually start a dbus user session, which may be required for makoctl(1) to work.

It took me way too long to figure this out myself, maybe this helps the next user installing x11/mako.

I also got a PR committed upstream to clarify the readme[1].

[1]: https://github.com/emersion/mako/commit/52b43540c671e4d9f31dd4984018c74eec54ab7b

QA:
* portlint -AC: looks fine
